rationale: The citing paper’s own note explicitly states it “extends … Luo, Kannan, and Ratchford (2008)” and contrasts its PIE/group-sourced mechanism against that prior method, which indicates a direct methodological/theoretical linkage rather than a passing mention. Both papers center on incentive-aligned preference elicitation with out-of-sample predictive validation, making the 2008 work a plausible core benchmark/source for the 2014 contribution.
